hotel_name: Khu nghỉ dưỡng Centara Mirage Mũi Né (Centara Mirage Resort Mui Ne)

reviews.title: Just One bad experience.
reviews.text: ...A very large resort is synonymous with lack of organization. Lunch and dinner food varied little or not at all. Breakfast had no tables to sit at, children running around shouting and crying, it looked like a fair.... a huge resort with only one breakfast area never works when you're looking for at least peace at breakfast....it's something we certainly don't have. Employees were always charging for drinks that were included in the package. I asked for ice and to open a bottle and they wanted to charge 300,000 VND. Don't expect a resort to relax, it's a resort for families and children, lots of children, to have fun and play games and listen to loud music. It wasn't what I expected to find. P.S. - A resort with a huge group of Indians who turned the bar into their own country by forcing the DJ to play Indian music, showing no respect for the people.
reviews.response:
Dear Manuel,
Thank you for sharing your feedback. Please accept our sincere apologies for the frustration and discomfort you experienced during your stay.

We are deeply sorry that the resort’s bustling, family-oriented atmosphere and the chaotic environment at breakfast did not provide the peaceful, relaxing getaway you were looking for. We also apologize for the inconsistencies regarding your package inclusions and the poor communication from our staff regarding service charges. Your comments regarding the dining variety and crowd management have been shared directly with our management team for immediate review.

We truly value your patronage and regret that we fell short of your expectations. We hope you will consider giving us another opportunity in the future to provide you with a much more seamless and comfortable experience.

Warm regards,
An Lai
Guest Experience Manager

reviews.title: The Worst 5-star Resort Ever Encountered
reviews.text: The title says it all. I found the crew to be unprofessional, discourteous, and the room lacking in basic standards of cleanliness. The food and beverage options provided during breaks, lunch, and dinner were very limited and did not meet expectations. Based on this experience, I cannot recommend this establishment and do not plan to return.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback following your recent visit to Centara.

We are truly sorry to learn that your experience did not meet your expectations. Please accept our sincere apologies for the concerns you raised regarding the professionalism of our team, the cleanliness standards of the room, and the limited food and beverage options provided during your stay. This is certainly not the level of quality and service we strive to deliver to our guests.

Your comments have been taken very seriously and have been shared with the relevant department heads for immediate review. We are reinforcing our service standards with our team and reviewing our housekeeping procedures to ensure that our rooms meet the high standards expected of a 5-star resort. Additionally, your feedback regarding the variety of food and beverage offerings has been passed on to our culinary team as we continuously work to improve our dining experience.

Guest feedback such

reviews.title: With the price tag, there is no reason to come back here ever again
reviews.positives:
Beautiful resort spread out on a hill area
Decent rooms
reviews.negatives:
- Because the resort is enormous, guests depend a lot on their buggy services to get around. This typically takes 30 min - 1 hour wait. During peak times guests are basically fighting to get on the buggies. If you can’t accommodate all of the guests, why oversell? This seems to be an issue for a long time now (based on other reviews), but clearly the management does not care
- Breakfast buffet is mediocre compared to standard of a 5-star resort
- Facilities are not well maintained (kids playground, gaming room, etc.)
- Power cut out 3 times during my 2 night trip (but briefly got it back). Heard from other guests that power went off for hours for them so I was just lucky

reviews.title: INCONVENIENT, WILL NOT RETURN
reviews.positives: Lot of pools for kids, quiet areas, many activities for big group
reviews.negatives:
INCONVENIENT, take lots of time only for WAITING FOR BUGGIES because the resort is too big. Front roads were very bad, only good road at the back gate. 
NO PRIVATE BEACH.
TOO FAR  from the other side of Muine (good restaurants, Phan Thiet center). 
It's take TOO LONG to check in in the crowded season (as like you are waiting at the immigration ~ everyone said)
Our bed has NO DUVET, only cover by a sheet on the top of the blanket, our body touch directly to the blanket.
Lots of TINY FLIES in the room, WILD DOGS running around the resort. We came here twice, last time I took pics and already gave feedback, but this time, we still saw some wonder around, even near kids' pools and sand pit areas. 
The bathroom floor is fine for us but SLIPPERY for our toddler, NO VENTILATION FAN in the bathroom.

reviews.title: Worst resort in Vietnam
reviews.text: The only thing half decent about this resort are the cottages. Management is so bad the local grab driver would do a better job. All negative reviews (which are plenty) are basicly correct! Best to avoid this place like the plague.  I am 5 days in waiting on a reply from management. Anyway if you missed the negative reviews like we did, just forget about the F&B facilities and go out for lunch and dinner and prepare for a lot of walks as buggies are far and few between.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback with us. We are glad to know that you found the cottages to be of decent quality.

At the same time, we are truly sorry to hear that your overall experience did not meet expectations and that you felt dissatisfied with various aspects of your stay, including service responsiveness, transportation convenience, and food & beverage facilities. We also sincerely regret that you have not yet received a timely response from our management team.

Please be assured that your comments are taken very seriously. We have escalated your feedback to the relevant departments and management team for immediate review and follow-up, particularly regarding communication delays, buggy service availability, and F&B operations.

We deeply regret that your stay was impacted in this way. Your feedback is important to us and will be used to strengthen our service standards and improve guest experience moving forward.

Sincerely yours,
Gue

reviews.title: 3 nights/4 Days At Centara
reviews.text: This was the worst 5-star resort we have ever stayed at. The cleanliness of the room does not meet the standard expected of a 5-star property. The table had stains from spilled drinks and food, and several items in the room were not working, including the refrigerator, desk phone, and hair dryer. The check-in staff were unprofessional, unfriendly, and not particularly helpful during our arrival. Although welcome drinks were displayed at the reception area, they were never offered to us. In contrast, the shuttle staff provided excellent service. They took the time to introduce the resort’s amenities, explain the surrounding area, and clearly outline the resort policies. The breakfast and dinner buffets offered a limited selection of dishes, and the food quality was just average. Only TWO types of juice were available as well. Having stayed at many 5-star resorts, I have never encountered a property with such disappointing standards—from the service and food quality to the cleanliness of the room. Unfortunately, I would not recommend this resort and would not return.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback regarding your recent 3-night stay at Centara. We sincerely regret to learn that your experience did not meet the expectations you rightfully have of a 5-star resort.

Please accept our sincere apologies for the shortcomings you encountered with the cleanliness of your room and the maintenance issues with the refrigerator, desk phone, and hair dryer. This certainly does not reflect the standards we aim to uphold, and your comments have been shared with our Housekeeping and Engineering teams to ensure that these matters are addressed immediately.

We are also very sorry to hear about your arrival experience. Professional, warm, and attentive service is something we take great pride in, and it is disappointing to learn that our front desk team did not deliver the welcoming service expected, including the welcome drink presentation. Your feedback has been forwarded to the Front Office management team so that addition

reviews.title: Tiếp tân tệ, quảng cáo tệ
reviews.text:
-  27/2/2026 trên fanpage ghi có dịch vụ đưa đón bằng xe điện đến bãi Làng Chài và bãi Ông Địa
Tuy nhiên khi đến, 6/3/2026, tiếp tân báo ko có dịch vụ đó, hỏi người khác thì lại bảo chỉ dành cho hạng phòng khác, người khác nữa lại bảo dịch vụ đó đã hết từ lâu, dù ngày đăng là ngày 27/2/2026 
- khi nhận phòng ( check in ), thấy phòng lộn xộn, có rác cũ, tăm xỉa răng đã dùng, và kiến rất nhiều trên bàn, giường, yêu cầu đổi phòng thì tiếp tân  chỉ cử người đến xịt kiến! Dẫn đến kiến bò lên giường lúc nửa đêm, rất khó chịu, phản hồi lại chi tiết lúc trả phòng ( check out) thì ko nhận dc lời xin lỗi nào mà cũng chỉ ậm ừ ghi nhận!
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Quý Khách,

Trước hết, chúng tôi xin chân thành cảm ơn Quý Khách đã dành thời gian chia sẻ phản hồi về trải nghiệm lưu trú gần đây. Chúng tôi vô cùng tiếc khi biết rằng kỳ nghỉ của Quý Khách đã không diễn ra như mong đợi và xin gửi lời xin lỗi chân thành vì những bất tiện mà Quý Khách đã gặp phải.

Liên quan đến thông tin dịch vụ xe điện đưa đón được đăng tải trên fanpage, chúng tôi rất lấy làm tiếc về sự thiếu nhất quán trong thông tin mà Quý Khách nhận được từ đội ngũ nhân viên. Đây rõ ràng là trải nghiệm không đáng có và chúng tôi đã ghi nhận ý kiến của Quý Khách để rà soát lại quy trình cập nhật thông tin cũng như đảm bảo đội ngũ tiếp tân được truyền đạt chính xác và đồng nhất về các dịch vụ hiện có.

Bên cạnh đó, chúng tôi cũng thành thật xin lỗi về tình trạng vệ sinh của phòng khi Quý Khách nhận phòng cũng như cách xử lý chưa thỏa đáng từ phía nhân viên. Những vấn đề như rác còn sót lại, côn trùng trong phòng và việc chưa kịp thời sắp xếp đổi phòng cho Quý Khách hoàn toà

reviews.title: Beautiful rooms & friendly staff but facilities cannot meet service demands.
reviews.positives: I really like the way the hotel staff provide service even though the facilities do not match the demands of the large number of visitors during the summer, and many corporations have their business trips.
reviews.negatives:
*** Regarding facilities: 
- When I first checked in, my room's refrigerator was hot and not working. I had to call reception to get it repaired the next day.  The television did not work; it could be switched on but did not show any images, including the resort's accessible cable or internet. 
- There is also a lack of electric vehicles, limited car parking, and no beach for families wanting to swim. The resort has many swimming pools, but it's recommended to swim early as the water may not always be clean. An E-Zone game center also requires a purchase and is not entirely free.

*** Food: The resort often puts us in one restaurant for breakfast buffets and then temporarily arranges other areas to serve, so it's chaotic. And because of that, on my last morning at the resort, I ordered wok seared beef flavor (Phở Bò Tái Lăn), but my meat was raw and red, the soup was cold, and I had digestive problems that day. 

Terrible experience!

reviews.title: I would not recommend this resort to anyone.
reviews.text:
I am writing to express my disappointment with my recent stay at the Centara Mirage Resort. I booked a 2-night stays, and I was very disappointed with the service we received.

When we arrived at the hotel, we had to wait over 30 mins to check in. The front desk was very crowded, and the staff seemed overwhelmed. When we finally checked in, we were given a room that was still wet from a recent cleaning, and the floor was slippery.

We decided to go out for dinner, and we called the front desk to request a electric mini bus. We waited over an hour for the bus, and we had to call the front desk multiple times to check on the status of our request. By the time the bus arrived, my two daughters were exhausted and hungry.

I am very disappointed with the service and facilities at the Centara Mirage Resort. I would not recommend this resort to anyone.

reviews.title: Di chuyển bất tiện và thái độ phục vụ không tốt
reviews.text:
Tôi ở đây 2 đêm từ 25-27/4/2026 trong dịp lễ giổ tổ Hùng Vương và có các trải nghiệm không hề tốt ở đây. 

Khi sắp tới, tôi được thông báo sẽ nhận phòng lúc 15h, cực kỳ ngạc nhiên vì đây là lần đầu trải nghiệm check-in trễ như vậy, bình thường sẽ là 14h ở các resort khác. Tuy nhiên, tôi đi với gia đình, vợ tôi mang thai và có 2 bé nhỏ đi cùng, nên cũng đã được hỗ trợ nhận phòng sớm lúc 13h30. Điểm này chỉ lưu ý chứ chưa phải thất vọng.

Khi mới vừa tới, mặc dù khách check-in đông và bắt đầu tăng lên, nhưng resort không lường trước hoặc không muốn tăng nhân viên hỗ trợ check-in, nên thời gian đợi check-in khá lâu.

Khi lưu trú:
- Phòng và khuôn viên đẹp, sạch sẽ, view tốt.
- Quầy ăn sáng thực sự là 1 trận chiến, quá đông với công suất phục vụ, khách k có chỗ ngồi để dùng bữa. Nhân viên thì vì khách đông nên thái độ k vui vẻ, k muốn hỗ trợ giúp đỡ. Tôi chứng kiến (chứ tôi k trải nghiệm), 1 vị khách hỏi nên để ống hút 2-3 lần nhưng nhân viên cố tình lờ đi và không trả lời. Khách nhờ tìm thêm 1 chiếc ghế nhưng nhân viên k hỗ trợ và rời đi.
- Resort khá lớn nên đi bộ với vợ mang thai và 2 trẻ nhỏ là khó khăn với gia đình tôi, nhưng đợi xe và gọi xe buggy lại là 1 trận chiến khác, cảm giác như bạn đang giành giật xe bus thời sinh viên hoặc kiểu như đang bắt xe về quê vào dịp tết nguyên đán vậy.
- Đồ ăn đặt lên phòng nguội và như là đồ ăn cũ (tôi đặt khoai tây chiên).
- Nước hồ bơi chỗ con thuyền cho trẻ em khá bẩn
- Bãi biển không có tiện ít, k có dù, ghế, bãi tắm. Gia đình tôi phải lái xe ra khá xa để tắm biển ở gần resort Anantara
- Cực xa trung tâm: tốn khoảng 30 phút lái xe (15km), nên gia đình nào k có xe cá nhân di chuyển thì taxi tốn tiền kinh khủng.
- Đồ chơi trong khu vui chơi (chỗ gần bowling) đã hư hỏng nhiều và đắt.
- 1 trải nghiệm cá nhân, không hẳn là do resort: Lúc tôi lái xe xuống cổng A để xem bãi biển có tắm được không lúc 17h30, và gia đình muốn về lại cổng B thì có hỏi bảo vệ. Với trải nghiệm các nơi khác thì bảo vệ sẽ chỉ dẫn khá nhiệt tình và vì họ là người bản địa nên sẽ lưu ý 1 số thứ. Nhưng bảo vệ ở resort này cứ chỉ kiểu dại đại cho xong, và gia đình tôi xem chút mắc kẹt ở con đường cát giữa nghĩa trang lúc 18h tối vì nghe theo đường đi bên hông resort để đi từ cổng A và cổng B. Nếu xe sedan thì chắc chắn sẽ nằm lại chỗ giữa nghĩa trang đó rồi.
reviews.response:

Chúng tôi xin chân thành cảm ơn Quý Khách đã dành thời gian chia sẻ phản hồi chi tiết. Xin gửi lời xin lỗi chân thành vì những trải nghiệm chưa tốt liên quan đến thủ tục nhận phòng, dịch vụ ăn uống, di chuyển trong khuôn viên cũng như các vấn đề khác.

Chúng tôi rất trân trọng việc Quý Khách vẫn ghi nhận chất lượng phòng và cảnh quan. Tất cả các góp ý của Quý Khách đã được ghi nhận và sẽ được chuyển đến các bộ phận liên quan để xem xét và cải thiện nghiêm túc. Sự an toàn, thoải mái và chất lượng dịch vụ của khách hàng luôn là ưu tiên hàng đầu của chúng tôi.

Chúng tôi rất lấy làm tiếc vì những bất tiện đã xảy ra và hy vọng sẽ có cơ hội được đón tiếp Quý Khách quay trở lại trong tương lai với trải nghiệm tốt hơn.
Trân trọng,
Guest Relations Team

reviews.title: Enjoyable despite the poor maintenance
reviews.positives: Beautiful setting, the place has lots of potential. Wonderful playgrounds for kids, a free carousel, nice villas, great views. Amazing entertainment every day. Very efficient buggy and room service via app
reviews.negatives: Overall maintenance is bad. The kids pool is just shabby with flooring coming off in huge chunks, water pressure in the slides is too low. Most of the facilities are in desperate need of renovation. The food is average and not on same level as other 5 star resorts in Vietnam we visited.

reviews.title: Resort tệ nhất từng trải nghiệm
reviews.text:
1. Di chuyển bằng xe điện không thuận tiện. Gọi lễ tân book xe điện thì phải chờ. Còn không phải bắt xe điện dạo như bắt xe đò. Nhân viên đi ngang thấy khách chờ còn trống chỗ trên xe cũng không đón.
2. Máy lạnh thì không lạnh. 
3. Chăn ga nệm không sạch dính máu. Ghế bị dơ thì nhân viên nói chỉ là vết ủi. Thay mới chăn ga gối cho khách thì nhân viên vô mặt khó chịu, thay ga mới thì kéo xuống sàn làm rớt ga xuống sàn thay trước mặt khách.
4. Đồ của khách trước sàn còn rớt lại không kiểm tra phòng trước khi giao cho khách. 
5. Buffet sáng không ngon. 
6.  Phòng thì dơ yêu cầu đổi phòng thì tiếp tân bảo nhân viên xuống dọn, dọn lại thì thái độ không vui. 
Resort nên coi lại là dịch vụ chăm sóc khách hàng là 5 sao hay 1 sao. Resort 5 sao mà tệ hơn cái khách sạn 2 sao nữa

Trân Trọng,
Guest Service Team

reviews.title: Worst Experience
reviews.text:
Huge Dissapointment Experience at Centara Mirage

Our stay at Centara Mirage was incredibly frustrating from the start. Checking in was a nightmare—Agoda provided a confirmation number that wasn’t in the hotel’s system, forcing us to call Agoda for a new one. This process took over 45 minutes, which is completely unacceptable. On top of that, the check-in line was extremely long, with many frustrated guests, no seating available, and a chaotic atmosphere filled with complaints and swearing. The guest behind me was particularly rude, adding to an already stressful situation.

After finally checking in, we had to wait another 30 minutes just to get a trolley to take us to our room. Once inside, we were disappointed to find that the bathroom was dirty, clearly rushed through during cleaning.

We didn’t even bother using the pool because it was overcrowded and far from relaxing. The following morning, we had to walk to breakfast because the wait for a trolley was too long. When we finally arrived, the food selection was limited, and the coffee was terrible.

Honestly, I could go on and on, but this was easily one of the worst resort experiences we've had. It was so bad that we decided to leave and move to another resort. If you're looking for a relaxing and enjoyable stay, I strongly recommend staying elsewhere.

reviews.title: Very long wait for check in and room very dirty
reviews.text:
This is my 5th time coming here. This time the room, we have to wait very long time. 3 hours since 12. We usually get priority since traveling with young children. But they kept the rooms and gave out to groups first. Each room checking in will get 1-2 rooms to wait while they clean the other rooms. We have only one room so we wait for very long time. My son was sick at the time they still made us wait until 2:30 and gave out dirty room to put luggages and they will clean later. If they were going to do this, they should have done it sooner.  Room, unbelievable dirty, I wouldn’t let my son walk or craw. I mean it’s doesn’t live up as 5 stars hotel.

3 times staying in villa 3 bedrooms. They got us in very quick. But, the villa are very dirty. They still have food left over in the fridge, pool floor very sticky from previous group party I believe. There are hairs all over the floor, bedrooms, bathroom.

Breakfast is ok, half board food is very little. They didn’t even provide water.

I will not coming back here. Movenpick is very new and way better than Centara if you are looking for kid friendly resort.

reviews.title: Great resort but unprofessional in some areas
reviews.positives:
Lovely resort - great for families. So much to do without even leaving the resort.
Great food.
reviews.negatives:
The buggy system was a bit frustrating - couldn't always book when needed. 
We also had a bit of an issue where we'd originally booked an apartment, and upon check-in were convinced to upgrade to a villa. We weren't sure about that but were told it wasn't much more money so we may as well. We agreed and got put in a villa. The following morning we were told that there was a problem with the villa that we were booked into, so needed moving to a new one. 
We packed up our luggage (rather than enjoying our first morning at the resort) and waited to be moved. 
When we arrived at the new villa, we went inside and the staff told us we'd been given the wrong price to upgrade, and needed to pay double what we'd been told, and asked us to make the payment immediately.
I said that we'd prefer to just go with our original booking (an apartment) if that were the case, because we were only persuaded to upgrade due to the price we were told. 
So we were told we may as well just leave it and stay in the villa we were given. That we could "worry about it later". We didn't know what that meant.  
But it definitely made us uncomfortable with our stay, and very confused at the lack of professionalism. It's just not what you expect from a resort like this.

reviews.title: Poor service
reviews.text:
Central is a hotel with huge compound with friendly staff. 
However, the downside is you will need buggy service to bring you around.  

We waited for one hour for buggy to pick us up. Called 4 times to front desk. They promised but no one show up. 

Called housekeeping for 4 times. Promised to deliver drinking water but no one showed up. 

Breakfast time is so crowded. You can't find a table. A safe time to go for breakfast is 10am when the crowd is less intensive.

All in all. Great hotel amenities but poor management.  Under staff. Avoid especially during peak seasons.

reviews.title: New Year’s Stay
reviews.text:
During our recent six night stay, we found the room itself spacious and well kept housekeeping came regularly to make the bed and refresh towels and water. However, towels were replaced only twice, despite multiple visits always something was missing. The pool area was clean and visually appealing, yet the service levels fell far below expectations for a property marketed as five star property.
No pool towels and sun beds after 11am.

The daily breakfast situation was absolutely chaotic. By 8am tables were already claimed, and guests scrambled for tables. Food trays emptied in minutes, and the same scene repeated every single morning from 8am. Drinks were not included in the bed and breakfast and lunch package, and every amenity from kayaking to kids' activities came with a steep surcharge. Even coconuts, which grow all around the area, ran out in pool bar before 10:30am unless pre-booked - what’s a joke! It felt more like a business model focused on upselling than guest comfort and high quality.

The bar experience was equally disappointing. Cocktails were syrup heavy based and lacked fresh ingredients, despite access of tropical fruits in the region. Mojitos were diluted, lack of mint lemon and the staff undertrained. Every drink tasted horrible and overpriced. There is lack of site management who actively ensuring service quality or staff support. While the team tried hard, it was clear they lacked the tools, knowledge and training to deliver high service.

We left feeling underwhelmed and disappointed. We thought the hotel is top list in area. This isn’t a place we’d recommend or return to unless significant improvements are made in leadership, training, and guest experience.
reviews.response:

However, we sincerely apologize for the inconsistencies you encountered with towel replacement and amenity replenishment, as well as the service shortcomings across several areas of the resort.

We are particularly concerned by your comments regarding the breakfast experience, pool facilities, and overall service flow. The congestion, lack of available seating, delayed food replenishment, and insufficient pool towels after peak hours are not reflective of the standards we aim to provide. Please accept our apologies for the frustration and inconvenience this caused throughout your stay.

Your

reviews.title: A wonderful experience overall—everything felt pleasant, soothing, and conducive to relaxation.
reviews.positives:
The staff are courteous and attentive, capably handling standard guest requests. The reception team, along with the F&B pool bar staff, are proficient in English communication. The internal shuttle service has seen notable improvements—it operates more efficiently, with minimal waiting time compared to what was mentioned in earlier reviews. Additionally, the shuttle system utilizes electric vehicles, contributing to a reduction in environmental emissions.

The resort is impeccably clean and well-organized, with PA staff carrying out daily maintenance, including leaf clearing. The swimming pool is consistently well-maintained, featuring crystal-clear water. Lifeguards are present at all times, ensuring that safety standards are reliably upheld.

The rooms are spotless, well-arranged, and thoughtfully designed with a practical layout. Housekeeping proactively services the rooms—tidying, replacing towels, and making up the room—even without a specific request from guests.

The restaurant is spacious and aesthetically pleasing, offering both indoor and outdoor seating options to suit different preferences. The service staff are prompt and efficient, demonstrating skill in table setup and clearing dishes. The hostesses have a stronger command of English compared to the casual labour.

Each evening features live music and fire dance performances, creating a lively and memorable atmosphere.
reviews.negatives:
The restaurant’s culinary offerings are somewhat limited in variety. The breakfast buffet presents a more extensive selection compared to the dinner service. However, the hot dishes at the dinner buffet are consistently tepid; throughout my two-night stay, they were invariably served cold each evening. 

It would be highly beneficial if the kitchen incorporated regional specialties from Phan Thiết, such as bánh bột lọc tôm and bánh canh chả cá, among others, to enhance both authenticity and diversity.

Additionally, we used the spa services. The experience would have been excellent if the therapists had paid slightly more attention to their personal grooming, particularly nails, during the massage sessions.

The organizers should carefully reassess the safety measures when allowing children to interact with performers at the end of the fire dance show, to ensure that adequate safeguards are in place.

Directly opposite the resort, the beachfront is not particularly sandy at the moment, as seasonal wind patterns tend to bring in a noticeable amount of natural debris. In addition, the access road to the resort is somewhat uneven; however, these factors are largely beyond control.

If a well-maintained, sandy beach is a key priority for your stay, it may be worth considering this aspect when making your booking.

reviews.title: Pretty resort but overpriced for what you actually get
reviews.positives: The pools are very nice
reviews.negatives:
The breakfast service was a madhouse. It was a national holiday so I expected it to be busy but there was way too many people. The staff couldn't keep up and there was no cleaning happening - just eating on dirty tables and spilled food on the ground. Pretty gross.
The pools allowed kayaks and stand up paddle boards which just crowded everything so much - one of the swimming pools (the only one with waterfalls flowing into it) even said no swimming because kayaks were being used but the pool was empty and nobody was kayaking. Very dumb policy which the lifeguard insisted on following.
The seafood buffet only allowed one small half lobster per group (a family of four only gets one) and there was no crab - for 800,000 vnd each I would expect more seafood at a seafood buffet. The lucky draw was a nice idea but the prizes sucked - a free cocktail or 30% off bowling (why is bowling charged anyway?). Make less prizes and something of value like a free night stay or something like any other resort would give. 
Overall, a pretty resort and facilities but not worth the money.

reviews.title: With Centara Mirage, you know what you will get
reviews.positives: Breakfast was decent with enough options to make it pleasing for the 4 days we were there. We stayed in a villa and it was a nice size, but I wish the kitchen provided a little more. Rooms and bathrooms were nice. Staff was extremely helpful and we never had to wait more than 2-3 minutes for a cart to come pick us up. The resort has done an excellent job in making sure there are enough carts going around the complex. Great areas for kids to play, inside and outside. My son was very happy with our time here and that was 95% of the reason we came here.
reviews.negatives: It isn't quite 2 years old, but there are already things that need to be updated or replaced (kids water park area's cushion around the slides and ship are breaking apart already). Further for a 5 start place, there is just too much litter on the premises. The staff need to be trained to take better care of the entire place, not just the rooms, villas, and buildings. Muine really is a fishing village and outside of the resort and some very good seafod restaurants nearby, there isn't much to do here. I can see this place being very different when more tourists and money come to this part of Vietnam. The workout area is 2 duplex villas converted. It is not very well labeled.

reviews.title: One Highlight but many Letdowns
reviews.text:
⭐️ One Highlight, But Many Letdowns
The only thing I truly enjoyed about the resort was the swimming pool—it offered a stunning view. Unfortunately, everything else fell short, making it far from a stress-free holiday.
From check-in to check-out, the service was mediocre at best. When we arrived, one of our rooms was flooded with rainwater, and the entrance was muddy, which left a poor first impression. Another room lacked basic supplies like toilet paper—we had to use our own tissues initially, and even after requesting some, they only gave us a single roll. I even joked, “What if we run out in the middle of using it?”
The resort is too large, and getting around is frustrating. You have to rely on electric buggy to move around the property. On a few occasions, we had to wait up to 30 minutes for a buggy which was especially difficult with kids.
In all four rooms we booked, the mini-fridge wasn’t working. When I raised this, I was told it was just a “cool box,” not a proper fridge—so having cold drinks wasn’t even an option.
Room service didn’t appear to be automatic—we had to request it in the afternoon if we wanted our room cleaned. One of our four rooms also smelled strongly of cigarette smoke, and we had to request a room change.
Even the buffet breakfast was stressful. It was overcrowded, and there weren’t enough staff to keep up with cleaning or refilling supplies. The worst part was spotting a long string of hair in one of the chafing trays. When I notified a staff member, I only received an “OK”—and no action was taken. I was stunned.
Lastly, when I politely asked for a bit more meat in my Vietnamese phở, I was told there was none left. I had to point out a large tray of meat sitting right behind the staff member before she reluctantly served me more.

To be honest, it also felt like many of the positive reviews on Agoda were not genuine. It made me suspect they may be paid reviews.

While the resort’s pool and views were impressive, the poor service, cleanliness issues, and frustrating logistics made our stay disappointing overall. For a resort of this size and standard, I expected much better.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

We're happy to hear that you enjoyed the swimming pool and its stunning view at Centara Mirage Resort Mui Ne. We're glad this part of your stay stood out positively.

However, we're truly sorry to learn that the overall experience did not meet your expectations. We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you encountered—from the condition of your rooms, delays in buggy service, mini-fridge concerns, to the buffet and service-related issues. This is far from the standard we aim to deliver.

Your detailed feedback is extremely valuable, and we take it seriously. Please be assured that your comments have been shared with the relevant departments for immediate review and improvement. We understand how frustrating these situations must have been, especially while traveling with children, and we deeply regret any impact it had on your holiday.

Thank you for taking the time to share your experience. We hope you might consider giving us another opportunity in the future

reviews.title: My family and I were pleased with our stay at your resort and would definitely come back.
reviews.positives:
The resort view is fantastic! My family and I were falling in love with the ocean view from the resort and the resort design itself.
Staff are polite and attentive, all requests/issues would be resolved in a timely manner.
The electric buggy vehicles service is very convenient and fast.
My nephew was really enjoy the fitness center, with full workout equipments and attentive staff.
reviews.negatives:
Some items in the 2 villas we stayed having issues like the table drawer wood cover fell out itself, or the safe was locked; however the staff/technicians came to resolve the issues quickly.
3-4 tiles pieces of the pool floor fell off  at one of our villa, so our 4 kids ended up swimming in our other villa. Staff came and check on it immediately and even provided us complimentary fruit dish, which my niece and nephews enjoyed, thanks for your thoughtfulness.
Some machines at the game center were not working. Only one pool table/billiards table open but some pieces of the game was broken, and the lazy river flow was turned off as well. So hopefully, in the future all of the activities are functioning and upgraded to bring a full experiences to all guests as expecting from what we learnt from the advertisement.

reviews.title: Less than a year old, and already going down
reviews.text:
The villa (2bed and pool) is great and clean, but...
There is a kitchen with no ability to clean any dishes, with food delivered to villa this is silly. 4 small espresso cups but no normal drinking glasses.
Water pressure in the villa is weak. Food delivery to the villa is very very slows 40+ min, and then the food you receive is cold. Don't bother, and one day food is ok, next day it is rough as anything.

To add to our sorrows, housekeeping didn't even bother to show up, so at the end of the day, we went back to a villa with dishes from the night before still in the sink (no dishwasher liquid), and the villa in the same state we left it in, fortunately we left it in good shape but not the point.

We are now on our 4th replaced coffee machine in the kitchen, they are now running out of stock and this is only day 2, another 7 to go.

Resort, not a huge amount going on, at first it seems like there a re a lot fo facilities, but kids get bored quickly.
Water pressure in the resort is low (so they can save money), so water cannons and water toys etc. in the pirate ship work as well as a broken water pistol, again, don't bother. The infinity pool at first looks awesome, then you realize they, again, have turned down the water pressure (save money), so it is supposed to cascade down over multiple pools but it doesn't, again, why they even bothered building this is beyond me, they shouldn't have bothered.

Ordering a couple of drinks from the pool bar and asking them to deliver it, is just setting the bar waaayy too high, delivery to one of the other pools is not possible, as they are too busy stocking the bar up with drinks, for the non-existant horde of people not drinking...
Ask for a towel at the pool, again not possible as they have run out.

The ONLY saviour we have over this 8 day adventure of pain and consistent let downs is an awesome gent at reception by the name of Quoc Thanh. If you are fortunate enough to be guided through the numerous pitfalls of disappointment valley whilst there by Thanh, then you are in extremely good hands. Centara should promote him to GM for the Mui Ne resort, and fire the existing manager, as he seems useless and more interested in "Saving Money"

reviews.text: The resort is really gorgeous, a lot of amenities and things to do for kids. You communicate and call a buggy through this app, they are fairly responsive but you need to give them time to receive your request, call a buggy and then since the resort is big, time for the buggy to get to you. I was there during the week so it’s not so busy but I still had to wait 10 mins at 4am for them to see my message and get to me. It’s located away from the Main Street about 4-5kms. The roads are underconstruction so it’s quite a ride to get around currently. Their staffs are friendly but the system seems to be slow, checkout took awhile as well. Keep that inconsideration when you have to leave at a certain time. Our car had to wait over 10 mins for us when we came 10-15mins early because the check out system was slow. Then we had to take a buggy to the gate in the back was another 5 mins and our buggy guy didn’t secure our luggage properly and it slid off on the road. Just not service you expect from a 5 star resort.

Please be assured that this is not the level of service we strive to deliver at a five-star resort.

Your valuable feedback has been carefully noted, and we will work closely with the relevant teams to improve response times, streamline operational processes, and reinforce staff training to ensure both safety and efficiency for our guests.

Kind regards,
Management Tea

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: The room was spacious and very clean, with a large and comfortable bed. The resort is huge and beautifully designed, offering plenty of fun activities like a game room, water park for kids, playground, karaoke, bar, and mini golf. There’s a long swimming pool right in front of the room, and guests can rent kayaks and snorkeling gear. A great place to relax and enjoy with family or friends!
reviews.negatives: Breakfast buffet could be more diverse. During peak hours, the dining area gets very crowded and staff struggle to refill food and water glasses in time. Food at the pool bar is quite overpriced. The resort is large, so guests rely heavily on electric carts to get around, but during busy times, the wait for a cart can be long. Outside food is not allowed in the rooms. Also, the hairdryer cannot be used in the bathroom due to weak power supply—it has to be used in the living area instead.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text:
I recently stayed at Centara Mui Ne and, while the property itself is visually impressive and well-designed, my overall experience was affected by several service issues.

First, the breakfast organization was not aligned with the restaurant’s actual seating capacity. Guests were admitted without proper control of table availability, which led to overcrowding and difficulty finding a place to sit. The number of guests clearly exceeded the number of tables the staff could effectively manage at that time.

Second, tables were not cleaned promptly after guests finished their meals. Many tables remained uncleared for an extended period, making it even harder for new guests to find seating. This created unnecessary congestion and reduced the overall comfort of the dining experience.

Finally, the buggy service from Lobby B was quite slow. We had to wait a long time for an electric cart, which was inconvenient, especially during peak hours or under the sun.

The resort has great potential thanks to its facilities and location, but improvements in breakfast management, table service efficiency, and transportation coordination between areas would significantly enhance the guest experience.

A nice place to spend a couple of days of vacation. Breakfast was excellent, a lot of varieties of food, Vietnamese and international, well assorted. Khách sạn mới: Khách sạn có cơ sở vật chất hiện đại, thiết kế đẹp mắt, tạo ấn tượng tốt ngay từ khi bước vào.

Khuôn viên: Khuôn viên rộng rãi, thoáng mát, rất phù hợp để nghỉ dưỡng và tận hưởng không gian yên bình. Đây là một điểm cộng lớn đối với những khách hàng muốn thư giãn và tận hưởng thiên nhiên.


Điểm cần cải thiện:

Buổi tiệc đêm: Tiệc đêm khá ồn ào, âm nhạc mở lớn đến mức không thể nói chuyện thoải mái với bạn bè hay gia đình. Điều này làm giảm sự sang trọng và cảm giác thư giãn mà khách sạn cần mang lại. Mong rằng khách sạn có thể điều chỉnh âm lượng hoặc tổ chức các buổi tiệc với phong cách tinh tế hơn để phù hợp với đa dạng nhu cầu của khách hàng.


Kết luận:
Khách sạn có nhiều điểm mạnh về cơ sở vật chất và không gian, nhưng cần chú ý hơn trong việc tổ chức các hoạt động giải trí để mang lại trải nghiệm hoàn hảo hơn. Tôi vẫn đánh giá cao chất lượng tổng thể và hy vọng sẽ quay lại khi những điểm yếu này được cải thiện.

Nhân viên có tư vấn mình cài app cantara để book xe điện cho nhanh, nhưng book trên app chẳng thấy phản hồi. Gọi điện thoại bàn thì gần như không gọi điện vì hệ thống báo bận/ hoặc không liên lạc được. Mình toàn phải sử sử dụng điện thoại di động gọi vào số tổng đài để gọi xe, rất lạu và khá bất tiện

Not too bad. But the buggy service within the the facility is a bit slow. Not too bad but definitely plan at least 15 to 20 minutes earlier to get to your car on time.

The resort is very pretty and worth it for a 2 night stay. I only stayed 1 night but I wished it was 2 nights. It's a bit far from where the strip where the actions at in Mui Ne but it's not too bad.

Besides the buggy being slow and the slowish checkin and checkout time, it's fine.

reviews.title: Fantastic
reviews.positives: The hotel is massive! Need to take golf buggies to dislodged in between the premises. Luckily our 2 bedroom villa was in the corner close to the swimming pools. If you are with kids this is the place to be. In our three weeks in Vietnam this was the hotel that our kids enjoyed the most. Many different pools and the sunset at the top pool is great. I would like to provide a special thanks to Mr. Tinh that did my check in and Mr. Thanh that was also involved in our check in / explanation. They were both very cordial, friendly, and extremely helpful. Hotels are all about hospitality and they both had a great way to greet us into the hotel. Thank you one more time Mr. Tinh and Mr. Thanh.

The hotel is so big that from the rooms to the reception is like a 3 minute buggy ride. I had to wait like 10 minutes at the reception upon check out for them to check the mini bar. No big deal but some folks might be right on time.

reviews.positives: Beautiful, family friendly resort. Many playgrounds, indoor bowling/games, outdoor jungle gym and pirateship pool! Highly recommend

reviews.text:
Khung cảnh đẹp, phòng cũng đẹp, sạch sẽ. Nv dọn phòng với các anh tài xế xe điện đều dễ thương. Tủ lạnh không hề lạnh 1 chút nào. Ca đựng đá thì có vỏ rác cà phê (có thể nv dọn phòng trước đó quên kiểm tra)

Khu chờ check in bị nhỏ, vừa đến nơi cũng không có nv hướng dẫn vào check in. 

Trời mưa đặt grab giao đồ ăn cũng không cho tx chạy lên sảnh giao, không lẽ bắt khách đội mưa xuống lấy???
Đồ ăn bình thường, cà phê hơi tệ quá với ks 5 sao. Cứ như cà phê bắp rất nồng mùi bơ thực vật. Các món nước khác cũng như nước lã thêm màu. Đây là ks 5 sao tệ nhất mình từng đi. Cũng là ks duy nhất mình không được check in sớm hơn 15h. 

Thẻ phòng cũng chỉ được duy nhất 1 thẻ, muốn thêm 1 thẻ phải đặt cọc gì đó nghe khá phiền.

Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết Quý khách hài lòng với cảnh quan, phòng nghỉ và sự thân thiện của đội ngũ nhân viên buồng phòng cũng như các anh tài xế xe điện – những phản hồi tích cực này là động lực lớn để chúng tôi tiếp tục nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ.

Bên cạnh đó, chúng tôi rất tiếc khi một số trải nghiệm chưa đáp ứng được kỳ vọng của Quý khách. Đặc biệt, chúng tôi xin phép được đính chính rằng resort không áp dụng chính sách yêu cầu đặt cọc khi Quý khách có nhu cầu nhận thêm thẻ phòng. Nếu có sự hiểu lầm hoặc trải nghiệm chưa phù hợp trong quá trình hỗ trợ, mong Quý khách thông cảm.

Một lần nữa, xin chân thành cảm ơn những phản hồi quý báu từ Quý khách. Chúng tôi hy vọng sẽ có cơ hội được đón tiếp Quý khách trở lại và mang đến một kỳ nghỉ trọn vẹn hơn trong tương lai.

Trân trọng,
An Tu
Centara Mirage Resort Mui Ne

reviews.title: Amazing and relaxing. Picture perfect!

Flew into HCM city, stayed a few days, then took a van to Centara Mirage Resort. We initially were only going to stay four days, but we ended up staying at entire week.

Kiddo loved all the pools, but also spent a lot of time at the arcade, small bowling center,  soft play area, and at  kids activities ￼scheduled daily. He learned to swim with his head underwater at free swimming lessons, and made friends at some of the activities.

My husband LOVED the fact that all of the accommodations were in villas. Gave us so much privacy and QUIET.

I loved that the brunch is a huge spread so we only paid for ￼dinners. Town is a two dollar cab ride away and you can eat like a king cheaply. (Go right outside the resort.)

Staff are all great too!

reviews.title: Đẹp, nhưng khó kéo khách lại lần nữa
reviews.text:
Gia đình tôi (với 2 trẻ nhỏ 11-15 tuôi và 2 người lớn tuổi) check-in văn Villa 2PN hồ bơi riêng chiều T7 tầm 14h (Khu resort chỉ cho nhận phòng từ 15h). Thời gian check-in với lễ tân tương đối nhanh gọn, dịch vụ ổn. Tuy nhiên, cảm nhận về việc chờ lâu... dần hiện rõ khi bước ra khu vực chờ xe điện về phòng. Hai người già sau chặng đường dài SG-PT đã hiện rõ dấu hiệu mệt mỏi, nhưng may mắn cuối cùng cũng được về đến phòng sau tầm 45p từ lúc báo số phòng cho bạn điều phối đến lúc về tới phòng. Thảm họa nhất là buổi tối, sau khi đi bơi về đói lả ra, nhưng gọi xe điện đi ăn thì thôi rồi. Sau khi gọi tổng đài 4 lần, đứng ra đường vẫy xe điện chạy ngang như mời khách.... cuối cùng gia đình tôi đã được lên xe sau gần 60p, tính từ tầm 6:15pm. (Kinh nghiệm xương máu, nên hôm sau gọi xe từ lúc 5:30pm, nhưng cũng mất 20p mới có xe).
Nhìn chung, ngoài việc phục vụ khách di chuyển bằng xe điện  trong nội khu và ra sảnh RẤT RẤT RẤT TỆ. (không rõ do thiếu xe hay thiếu tài xế), chất lượng trang thiết bị phòng nhìn chung ổn (vẫn có hiện tượng rò rỉ nước từ tủ lạnh và bồn tắm), thiết kế không gian villa và không gian tổng khu đẹp, khu hồ bơi vô cực và chơi nước không có gì quá đặc biệt (đường trượt nước hơi thấp, nên dốc hơn chút xíu thì trẻ tầm 11-15 tuổi sẽ thích hơn.
Nhưng chắc chắn gia đình tôi sẽ không quay lại sau trải nghiệm dịch vụ di chuyển nội khu thảm họa như vậy.

Chân thành xin lỗi Anh/Chị và gia đình về những trải nghiệm lần này chưa được như kỳ vọng và chúng tôi vô cùng cảm ơn sự thấu hiểu của Anh/Chị.

reviews.title: Disappointing Experience with Restaurant Staff at a 5-Star Resort
reviews.text:
We were a group of 15 guests staying in 7 rooms at the resort. Due to the rain, we brought hotel umbrellas from our rooms when taking two separate buggies to the restaurant for breakfast.

When the first buggy arrived, our group handed over several umbrellas to the restaurant host for safekeeping. The host accepted them but did not record the quantity or ask for any details. She only collected the room keys to verify our breakfast entitlement.

When the second buggy arrived, we handed over the remaining umbrellas and room keys. This time, the same host recorded the number of umbrellas on her notes before allowing us to enter the restaurant.

After breakfast, we returned to collect our umbrellas. However, the host only returned the umbrellas that had been recorded from the second buggy. She claimed there was no record of the umbrellas handed over by the first buggy and therefore refused to return them.

I explained that when the first group arrived, she had accepted the umbrellas without recording them. As hotel guests, we had no way of knowing that each umbrella needed to be individually recorded. Instead of investigating the matter professionally, she repeatedly insisted that there was "no record" and denied any possibility of a mistake on her part.

I requested that the CCTV footage at the restaurant entrance be reviewed, as it would clearly show our group handing over the umbrellas upon arrival. The host, whose name was Thuong, immediately refused and responded with a firm "No."

What disappointed us even more was her attitude. Rather than listening and trying to resolve the issue, she was argumentative, dismissive, and spoke to us in an unprofessional manner.

I then requested to speak with the restaurant manager. A gentleman who identified himself as the manager stepped forward. Unfortunately, his response was no better. Despite witnessing the entire discussion, he also refused to review the CCTV footage and repeatedly stated, "No record, no umbrellas." He then walked away while making a phone call, leaving us without any solution or assistance.

As a result, I went to the reception desk and reported the incident to the Duty Manager. While I was discussing the matter with her, my sister continued speaking with the restaurant team. Eventually, the restaurant manager informed us that several umbrellas had been found at another counter that had not been recorded by their staff, and he told us to collect them ourselves.

Ironically, this confirmed that their record-keeping was indeed incomplete and that the issue was caused by staff error from the beginning.

This entire situation could have been resolved quickly with proper communication, professionalism, and a willingness to investigate. Instead, we were forced to argue with staff over a simple matter while on holiday. We came to the resort to relax and enjoy our stay, not to defend ourselves over missing umbrellas.

For a 5-star resort, the service provided by the restaurant team was extremely disappointing. The attitude, communication skills, and problem-solving ability demonstrated by Thuong and the restaurant manager fell far below the standards expected of a luxury hospitality establishment.

That said, I would like to acknowledge the excellent service provided by the reception team, Duty Manager, and housekeeping staff. They were professional, polite, and efficient throughout our stay and when handling our complaint.

Unfortunately, the actions of the restaurant host and manager significantly impacted our overall experience. I strongly recommend that the resort review this incident and provide additional training on customer service, communication, and complaint handling.

Very disappointed with this experience.

reviews.title: Worse customer service
reviews.text:
We requested for a late check-out the night before and were told to call back during breakfast to check availability. We followed the instructions and called the next morning, and the receptionist confirmed that we could extend our check-out time until 2pm.

However, we were later informed that it was no longer possible because another guest was checking into the same room. Considering that the resort is practically empty, this should not have happened. If they were unsure, they should not have given us a confirmation in the first place.

Overall, we are very disappointed with the unprofessionalism displayed.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback with us. We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you experienced regarding the late check-out request.

We understand how frustrating it must have been to receive a confirmation in the morning, only to be informed later that the arrangement could no longer be honored. This miscommunication is unacceptable, and we deeply regret the inconvenience caused to your stay. Regardless of occupancy levels, our team should have provided clear and accurate information from the beginning.

Please rest assured that we are addressing this issue with our front office team to ensure better coordination and more professional communication moving forward. Your comments are extremely valuable in helping us improve our service standards.

Once again, we sincerely apologize for the disappointment you encountered. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back and provide you with a much more seamless and pleasant experience.

Centara Mirage Resort Mui Ne

reviews.title: Good but not ideal
reviews.text: If you're looking to stay at a huge resort and do nothing but enjoy the ocean view and amenities within the resort then this is the best place to stay.  This resort located right at the ocean but has no beach. It supposed to have 3 restaurants on premises but only one was open and the food was not bad but not good either. The restaurant staffs seem to cater to only western looking guests (White) while ignoring Asian guests as if we don't exist. Breakfast was good on the first day but terrible the last 2 days. There is no outside restaurant nor shopping  within walking distant. You'll have to take a taxi a good distant from the resort to go eat or shop outside the resort and about 10 km to the nearest public beach. Other than that, loved my room, bed and the resort itself. Beautiful resort!!! Staffs were very helpful and friendly except for the restaurant staffs.

breakfast was okay but couldnt meet any kind of 4-5 star expectation. the dining area was not well cleaned and maintained. We experienced 3 power cut within a morning, it was horribly unacceptable for this kind of hotel. 
The pools are big but nothing special nor comfortable, we couldnt find any towel. 
The resort is kinda far from centre. I dont recommend it.
reviews.response:
Dear Ms/Mr. Anh, 
Thank you very much for taking time to share your feedback

We are glad to hear that you and your family had a pleasant stay with us recently.
It is always encouraging for us to learn that our guests are satisfied with our services and facilities as it is what we strive for every day.

Your recommendations and feedback are very important and please rest assured that we have taken it for further improvement.

May I take this opportunity to thank you again for staying with us and look forward to hearing from you we hope having the opportunity to welcoming you back again.

Sincerely yours,
Willow Nguyen
Guest Service Team

reviews.title: Würde ich nicht weiter empfehlen. Schlechter menschlicher Umgang.
reviews.positives:
Unterkunft die Häuschen sind nett.
Lage sehr schlecht.
Für Familien wohl perfekt.
Für uns als Paar nicht gut.
reviews.negatives:
Die Lage.
Das Personal oft überfordert, schlechte Englisch Kenntnisse.
Hotel Antwortet nicht auf Fragen oder Bitten.
Wollten ein anderes Zimmer wegen der Lage.
Hatten schon eines der teuersten und die wollten für Zimmer Wechsel noch Geld haben.
Man darf nichts zu essen mitbringen ins Hotel sonst droht Strafe. Das musste man auch unterschreiben, aber Angebot gab es nicht wirklich, außer überteuerte Getränke und schlechte Buffet für zu viel Geld. 
Das ist eine Abzocke vom Hotel und eine totale Frechheit wie dort mit einem umgegangen wird. Und das für viel Geld was man da bezahlt und für angebliche 5 Sterne.
Es gleicht allen eher einer Massenabfertigung als einem Urlaub.

reviews.title: Overall good but bad experience with receptionist
reviews.text:
I booked 3 bedroom, we have 6 kids. The receptionist told us I have to pay extra for 3 kids because they only allow 3 kids in villa. I told them 2 of our kids are infant, 2 are 1 year old. Besides, on room suppose to have 2 kids under 6 or 12 for free unless I request additional bed. 
They let me go but told me i might have to pay breakfast for the kids tomorrow. I agreed and said my kids dont even know how to eat yet. Omg. 
Even asking for additional key are tough. We have 3 rooms 6 adults. We asked for 3 keys are reasonable. 

This time we have experience power outages throughout the day. It was hot at night with no AC. The light in living room was broken, pool was dirty. 

Breakfast was okay similar with 4 stars hotel not 5. Some of the food are cold. 

Compare with the last time I were here, this time I pay more and received less. Also, I have bad experiences with receptionist
reviews.response:
Dear Ms. Linh, 
Thank you for your trust and taking time to share your experience at Centara Mirage Resort Mui Ne!
We are deeply sorry for the reception service experience. We understand your feeling and your expectation as well. Through your feedback, we can see our service quality and we need to action immediately. 
Again thank you for your feedback and we do hope that you have not lost complete confidence in us and we can continue to welcome you back here at Centara Mirage Resort Mui Ne.

Warm regards,
Centara Mirage Resort Mui Ne Management Team

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Thanh an der Rezeption war sehr freundlich, engagiert und kompetent. Bei ihm haben wir uns sehr gut aufgehoben gefühlt. Die Anlage an sich war wunderschön.
reviews.negatives:
Die Zimmer waren auf den ersten Blick sauber, jedoch schaut man genau hin sieht man schnell, dass sie verdreckt sind. Schimmel im Bad, Zentimeter dicke Staubschichten an dem Deckenventilator und an anderen Stellen im Zimmer, am Kopfteil (headboard) vom Bett waren Zierelemente abgefallen und legten scharfkantige Metalteile frei und das Babybett war in einem sehr schlechten Zustand und nicht zu gebrauchen.
Nach unserer Beschwerde wurde uns zwar ein Upgrade angeboten jedoch zogen wir es vor in ein anderes Hotel zu gehen. Es hat über eine Stunde und ettliche Diskussionen und Anrufe gekostet bis wir endlich unser Geld für die verbleibenden Nächte zurück bekommen haben.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: There was a happening, but one of the staff(i forgot to ask his name) solved it well, so I was satisfied.
reviews.response:
Dear Mr./ Ms. Heejung,

We very much appreciate your kind words regarding your experience at Centara Mirage Resort Mui Ne. 

Actually, it brings us great pride to hear that you did enjoy your  experience with our executive staff. This definitely serves as an encouragement to all of us as we always try to bring our guests the best service.

Once again, thank you for your feedback. We look forward to welcoming you back soon.

Sincerely,
Guest Services

reviews.title: Die Lage ist top. Der Service im Hotel war hervorragend: Schwimmbad, Kinderspielplatz, Restaurant, Frühstück. Aber es ga
reviews.positives: Das Hotel und die Umgebung war super.
reviews.negatives: Nur wenige Mitarbeiter sprachen Englisch. Sobald die Mitarbeiter merken, dass du ein Ausländer bist, ignorieren sie dich und sie sind zurückhaltend. Für das, was ich bezahlt habe, bin ich sehr enttäuscht. Sie waren unprofessionell.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Depending solely on buggy for going around the complex, sometimes you have to wait a few minutes. First day check-in, the room phone didn't work so I had to make an international call to get it repair, turned out the cable was connected to the wrong input on the phone itself. Room is spacious, clean. Staff was fantastic and helpful. Free breakfast has very good selection of Viet dishes and Western ones. The one I don't like the most is the road in front of the resort has been under repair/construction, very messy, full of potholes with water, cars had to slow down when they had to avoid the potholes. I wouldn't come back unless the road is fully contructed.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,
Thank you for sharing your detailed feedback. We are pleased to know that you found the room spacious and clean, enjoyed the breakfast selection, and appreciated the support from our staff.

At the same time, we sincerely regret the inconvenience you experienced with the in-room phone, buggy waiting time, and the external road conditions. Please accept our apologies for any discomfort caused during your stay.

Your comments have been carefully noted and shared with the relevant teams for review and improvement. We truly appreciate your honest feedback as it helps us enhance the overall guest experience.

We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you again in the future under better conditions.
Sincerely yours,
Guest Relations Team

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
Der Aufenthalt im Centara Mirage Resort war leider eine grosse Enttäuschung und entspricht in keiner Weise den Erwartungen an ein Familienresort.
Schon der Empfang war äusserst mühsam, da wir beim Check-in unnötig lange warten mussten, obwohl das Personal an sich freundlich war.
Die kulinarische Erfahrung war in allen drei Restaurants gleichermassen unbefriedigend.
Weder das Frühstück noch das zusätzliche Essen am Mittag oder Abend konnte qualitativ überzeugen, was bei diesem Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis absolut inakzeptabel ist.
Der absolute Tiefpunkt und ein massives Sicherheitsrisiko ist jedoch der Zustand des Kinderpools.
Der Poolboden ist an vielen Stellen kaputt und scharfkantig, was eine erhebliche Verletzungsgefahr für spielende Kinder darstellt.
Dass solche offensichtlichen Mängel ignoriert und nicht repariert werden, ist schlichtweg unverantwortlich und gefährlich.
Ausser der guten Lage gibt es leider keinen Grund, dieses Hotel weiterzuempfehlen, solange die Sicherheit und die Qualität nicht massiv verbessert werden.

reviews.title: The best experience
reviews.text:
A lodging that feels like being in Europe.   
A spacious two-story villa with a private pool.  
An infinity pool with clean and clear water.  
European-style buildings and a beautiful beach enjoyed from the pool.  
Leisurely meals and relaxing in the expansive complex while riding a buggy.  

I recommend this resort for relaxation in Mui Ne.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you very much for sharing your wonderful experience with us.
We are delighted to hear that you enjoyed the European-style atmosphere, the spacious two-story villa, and the private infinity pool with its clear and clean water. It is especially gratifying to know that you appreciated the beautiful beach views, relaxed dining experience, and the convenience of getting around the resort by buggy.
Your recommendation of our resort as a place for relaxation in Mui Ne means a great deal to us. We sincerely look forward to welcoming you again for another memorable and restful stay. Thank you.

Warm Regards,
Centara Mirage Resort Mui Ne

reviews.title: Auf Familien mit Kindern ausgerichtet
reviews.positives: Das Resort ist wirklich riesig und doch individuell gestaltet.  Wir hatten ein Häuschen direkt mit pool Zugang
reviews.negatives:
Die extrem vielen Kinder 
Das Hotel ist leider nicht für Ruhe suchende

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
Nice place to stay if you want to be alone or experience what exile might be like.... or if you're with your extended family or big group I guess. 

Very spread out... basically a small village. Swimming pool is awesome. Area around is relaxing too. Can imagine it gets loud with lots of people. When we stayed lots of people didn't have sun loungers and the staff around the ok weren't really that helpful. Tried to order from the pool bar at 11am or so (it opened at 10 according to their menu) but the bar guy did not take the order (laziness?). The staff were not so great at customer service. Quite cold. I had to ask or repeat myself several times throughout the stay. It seemed like they either couldn't be bothered.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback following your stay with us. We are pleased to read that you enjoyed the swimming pool, the peaceful surroundings, and the unique layout of our property.

At the same time, we sincerely regret that certain aspects of your experience did not meet your expectations. Please accept our apologies for the inconvenience caused by the limited availability of sun loungers and for the service you received at the pool bar. Your comments regarding staff attentiveness and customer service are taken very seriously, and we will address these matters with the relevant teams to ensure improvements are made.

Providing a welcoming and attentive service is very important to us, and we are sorry if this was not consistently reflected during your stay. Your feedback is valuable and helps us identify areas where we can enhance the guest experience.

We truly appreciate your comments and hope to have the opportunity to welcome you again

reviews.title: Überteuerte in die Jahre gekommene Anlage mit viel Angebot für Kinder
reviews.positives: Super freundliches Personal und immer stets bemüht. Viele Aktivitäten für Kinder, zB auch Ballon-Tierchen zum Essen, Karussell, Indoor Bälle Bad. Großes Bett und schöner privater Pool. Praktische App trotz schlechter Programmierung. Zusätzliche Bettdecke etc. wurde sehr schnell geliefert.
reviews.negatives: Essen unterirdisch, sieht toll aus schmeckt allerdings nach Nichts. In room Dining war ok. Anlage schon in die Jahre gekommen und bedarf dringend einer Renovierung. Beim Kinder Pool löst sich der Boden Belag ab mit  Stolpergefahr. Baby Bett war eine Frechheit - konnte nicht Mal gerade stehen. Auflagen am Pool verdreckt und alt. Kein Schatten am privaten Pool. Als Hinweis, beim Check Out wird das Zimmer erst noch vom Personal geprüft benutzt man Abreisen kann. Kein direkter Zugang zum Meer, allerdings schöner Meerblick vom Pool.

reviews.title: Resort hotel
reviews.text: The hotel was very nice. The view was also beautiful. The distance from the hotel entrance to the room is quite long, so it's a bit tiring to walk without a buggy! But the buggy comes quickly, so it's not a problem! Any broken items were promptly fixed, which made for a comfortable stay. (There were issues like the refrigerator, the door lock not working, and the safe not being usable, but they were fixed right away.) The pool is very spacious, there is a kids' club, a park, and a carousel, allowing the children to play a lot. The Christmas dinner, breakfast, and meals were all very delicious. The fire show was incredibly moving! Although there's almost nothing around, bringing food is prohibited, so you have to eat outside or at the restaurant! Please be careful. (You have to sign a paper stating that bringing in food is prohibited during check-in.) It is quite a distance to Phan Thiet. The downtown area is not too far, and Grab rides come quickly! You cannot rent a motorbike at the hotel! Currency exchange from Japanese yen is not possible at Lotte Mart, but you can exchange it at tour offices on Nguyen Dinh Chieu street. The rates are overwhelmingly better if you exchange in Ho Chi Minh City!
reviews.response:
この度は当リゾートホテルにご宿泊いただき、また詳細で温かいご感想をお寄せいただき、誠にありがとうございます。

ホテルの雰囲気や景色、広々としたプール、キッズクラブや公園、メリーゴーランドなどの施設をお楽しみいただけたとのこと、大変嬉しく拝読いたしました。お子様にも楽しいお時間をお過ごしいただけたご様子で、私どもにとって何よりの喜びでございます。

また、バギーサービスや設備不具合（冷蔵庫・鍵・金庫など）への迅速な対応についてご評価いただき、ありがとうございます。今後もお客様に快適にお過ごしいただけるよう、設備管理と対応力の向上に努めてまいります。

クリスマスディナーや朝食を含むお食事、そしてファイアーショーにつきましてもご満足いただけたとのお言葉を頂戴し、スタッフ一同大変励みになります。

一方で、飲食物の持ち込み制限や立地条件、交通手段、両替に関する実用的な情報についても共有いただき、ありがとうございます。これらは今後ご宿泊をご検討されるお客様にとっても大変参考になる内容であり、心より感謝申し上げます。

改めまして、この度は貴重なお時間を割いてご感想をお寄せいただき、誠にありがとうございました。ぜひまた機会がございましたら、再び当リゾートへお越しいただけますことを、スタッフ一同心よりお待ち申し上げております。

敬具
ホテルマネジメント

reviews.title: Wäre besser verlaufen, wenn die Mitarbeiter geschult würden.
reviews.positives: Die Anlage ist sehr groß und Kinder und Familienfreundlich was die Außenanlagen betrifft.
reviews.negatives: Wir haben eine Villa für drei Erwachsene und ein Kind gebucht. Leipzig war für zwei Personen keine Bettwäsche vorhanden. Somit mussten wir ohne auf dem schmutzigen Sofa übernachten. Der Teppich war leider auch ziemlich dreckig. Da wir Halbpension hatten konnten wir aus der Karte aussuchen. Wir wurden täglich an einen Tisch gesetzt wo es sehr kalt war und Wasser aus der Klimaanlage tropfte. Im gesamten Zeitraum war das Personal nicht in der Lage diesen Umstand zu ändern. Wir mussten bis zur ersten Bestellung 40 Minuten warten und täglich wurde Essen vergessen. Unsere Enkelin bekam das Essen immer als letzte mit einem Abstand von 30 Minuten. Das Frühstück war eine Art Kampfsport gewesen. Da die Tische nicht ausreichend vorhanden waren, musste man sich mit den Rest zufrieden geben. Tische hatten meist kein Besteck oder Servierten. Nach allem musste man betteln und hinterher fragen.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Die Anlage ist schön gestaltet und die Zimmer sind geschmackvoll eingerichtet. Das Frühstücksbuffet ist riesig groß und alles hat sehr gut geschmeckt.
reviews.negatives: Die Anlage ist riesig, man bewegt sich nur mit Golfcars. Das funktioniert ganz gut, ist aber umständlich.  Hotel ist voll ab vom Schuss und so ausgelegt, dass man sich nur innerhalb der Anlage bewegt. Bars und nette Restaurants ausserhalb sind zu Fuß nicht erreichbar.  Einen schönen Strand gibt es nicht. Für Familien mit Kindern o.k., aber wir würden nicht mehr kommen, da man den Flair vor Ort voll verpasst.

reviews.title: Gerne wieder mit Kind, aber dann zu einer anderen Zeit. Für Paar-Luxus ein anderer Ort...
reviews.positives: Die Lage mit Blick auf das Meer war herausragend; die Anlage ist ziemlich groß, bietet aber einen guten Shuttle-Service. Man muss eine App zur Kommunikation installieren, über welche aber die Kommunikation sehr einfach und unkompliziert möglich ist. Insgesamt bietet die Anlage viele Aktivitäten (s. Hinweis unten) und ist angenehm ruhig aufgrund der Lage.
reviews.negatives: Die ganze Anlage wirkte leider, als wäre sie im Winterschlaf - auch was die Anzahl an Gästen anbelangte; der Pool machte um 18 Uhr zu, manche Klettergerüste für die Größeren waren geschlossen und der Betreuungsservice für Kinder insgesamt recht dürftig. Es gab insgesamt ein ausreichendes Angebot an Aktivitäten, doch leider musste man für jede Kleinigkeit extra bezahlen (Bowling, Mini-Golf, großer Spielplatz, Paddelboote, Gips-Mal-Figuren für Kinder etc. pp). Wir hatten ehrlich gesagt aufgrund der Beschreibung mehr erwartet und waren im Detail manchmal irritiert, dass "der letzte Pfiff" fehlte.

reviews.title: staff need more training
reviews.text: The staff at this hotel need more training in customer service. Everything seems to revolve around money; even when we paid our bill prior to arriving at the restaurant, we kept getting harassed about making the payment. This level of service is unacceptable from a 5-star hotel.
reviews.response:
Dear Ms/ Mr. Mehdi, 

Thank you very much for taking time to share your feedback. We are so sorry to learn about your negative experience.

Please accept our sincere apologies for the inconvenience caused and we highly appreciated your kind understanding.

Please rest assured that we have taken your recommendations into consideration for further improvement.

May I take this opportunity to thank you again for staying with us and we hope to have the opportunity to welcoming you back again. 

                                
Sincerely yours,
Willow Nguyen
Guest Service Team

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Eine außergewöhnliche, mega große Anlage mit über 900 Bungalows und einer gigantischen Poolanlage. Die Zimmer sind sehr komfortabel und sauber. ABER...........
reviews.negatives:
Wir haben uns bereits zu Beginn nicht willkommen gefühlt. Ich schließe mich einer Bewertung an "mit aufgesetzter Freundlichkeit"
Man sollte wissen, dass das Hotel 99,9 % von Vietnamesen gebucht wird. 
Das Frühstücksgebäude erstreckt sich über zwei Etagen. Mehr als 400 Person haben sich durch die engen Gänge gedrängt, um zum Buffet zu gelangen. Es war sehr laut und chaotisch. Nicht einem 5 Sterne 🌟 Hotel würdig. Ohne Caddy war es nicht möglich zur Rezeption oder zum Frühstückshaus zu gelangen. Die Straßen sind kilometerlang. Man bucht den Caddy über eine App, und wartet bis man abgeholt wird. Dort zu spazieren macht keinen Spaß, wegen ständigem Verkehr.
Lassen sie sich nicht durch das Foto mit Standlage täuschen. Es gibt einen schmalen, mit Platten befestigen Streifen am Meer der total verdreckt ist. Die Lage am Ortsrand ist nicht schön. Wir sind sogar zwei Tage früher abgereist. Ich finde, dieses Hotel ist geeignet für Familien mit Kinder, die das Hotel nie verlassen.
Romantik darf man nicht erwarten. Angeboten sind Freizeitaktivitäten, alle kostenpflichtig.
Das Fitness Center besteht aus drei mini Räumen und lasst zu wünschen übrig.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Should not arrange two different guests to stay in family room type because it's just separated by a thin wall and a door, therefore, we got annoyed by the neighbor noise in early morning.

reviews.negatives: Kinderpool war schmutzig. Personal war nicht besonders freundlich und professionell. Frühstück war nicht besonders gut. Klimaanlage war kaputt. Mehrmals Stromausfall gehabt. Man muss für Eiswürfel, Zusatzdecke, Spiele, usw. Mit einen saftigen Preis rechnen. Einfach nur lächerlich für ein 5 Sterne Resort.

reviews.title: Great for family
reviews.text: Once you actually get your way to Mui Ne, the Centara is a great place for the family to unwind and chill. Villas with pool gives everyone plenty of space; but the central pools and slides are great fun for the younger ones. Some patience required when resort gets busy - dining area gets superpacked for breakfast, and there's some wait time for a buggy to get you from your villa to wherever you want to go round the resort.
reviews.room_type: Villa 2 BR Private Pool Ocean View King

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Das Resort hat eine wunderbare Aussicht und liegt zentral für die umliegenden Attraktionen. Die Wasserlandschaft ist wunderschön und das Resort bietet einem alles (gegen entsprechende Preise), damit man es sich gut gehen lassen kann.
reviews.negatives: Es gab einen langen Stromausfall in der Wohnung, welcher es sehr heiß werden ließ. Die Kompensation dafür gab es nicht.

reviews.title: Good and Bad
reviews.text:
We enjoyed our stay overall.  Rooms were new, nice, clean, and everything worked.  Staff all very friendly and helpful.

Pool, gym, spa all had weird limited hours 9am-6pm.  Buffet lacked international coffee options without extra charge.  Transportation to and from your villa took up to 45min at times (to far to walk).  There is NO sauna or Steamroom.

Typical errors in Vietnam, not even close to a 5* hotel anywhere else in the world.
reviews.response:
Dear Robert
	
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback from your visit to the Centara Mirage Resort Mui Ne. 
		
We are delighted to read from your review that you had enjoyed your recent stay with us and we also appreciate you pointing out the excellent service you received from our team member.
 
Please accept my sincere apologies for the shortfalls you encountered as you have mentioned, and those points will be highly taken under consideration and informed to the concern department heads to seek a prompt improvement.

It is always a pleasure to have you as our guest and on behalf of all the team member at Centara Mirage Resort Mui Ne, we look forward to welcoming you back.

Cheers, 

Hoang Nguyen

Guest Relation Manager
Centara Mirage Resort Mui Ne

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Die Villa mit Pool war wirklich wunderschön, auch die ganze Poolanlage war sehr schön und sauber
reviews.negatives: Das Essen egal Frühstück, Abendessen oder in dem Restaurant war wirklich schrecklich. Ich hatte noch niemals so eine schlechte Pizza wie in diesem Italienischen Restaurant. Nach zwei Tagen sind wir nicht mal mehr zum Frühstücken gegangen. Auch das Abendessen und Room Service waren alle sehr schlecht. Der private Pool wird nicht automatisch gereinigt, wir mussten immer danach fragen. Auch der ganze Ablauf beim Essen entspricht keinesfalls einem 5 Sterne Hotel
